meta.title: Notes — capture your ideas
meta.description: A fast, clean notes app. Write, organize, pin and color your notes — synced securely across your devices.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to access your notes.
auth.signupSubtitle: Start capturing your ideas in seconds.
auth.checkEmail: Check your inbox to confirm your email, then sign in.
auth.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

notes.title: Your notes
notes.subtitle: Everything you've captured, in one place.
notes.emptyBody: Create your first note to get started. Your notes stay in sync across every device.
